name: Car Stunts Adventure
author: Poki
description: Car Stunts Adventure is a driving game where every level challenges your stunt skills to the max! Jump, flip, and fly through wild obstacle setups as you aim for perfect landings and epic finishes. The stunts get tougher, the tracks get crazier, and the fun never stops! Earn coins to unlock awesome new cars and keep the action going. Ready to stunt your way to victory? How to play Car Stunts Adventure? Speed Up: W or the up arrow key Brake: S or the down arrow key Position Your car: A/D or left and right arrow keys Who created Car Stunts Adventure? Car Stunts Adventure is created by SARJ & Co. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Car Stunts Adventure for free? You can play Car Stunts Adventure for free on Poki. Can I play Car Stunts Adventure on mobile devices and desktop? Car Stunts Adventure can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
